title: 2026-01-20 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 34.74
description: New daily signal for 2026-01-20: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 34.74/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-01-20, the score printed 34.74/100 in the elevated regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
